summary: This indicator tracks how many Cash Assistance clients HRA helped place into jobs, which fell during the pandemic era when New York State waived mandatory work-engagement requirements for CA recipients. Fiscal 2024's dip to about 8,100 reflected a pause in voluntary employment referrals as HRA prepared to resume state-mandated activities; the subsequent jump to nearly 22,000 in Fiscal 2025 came as HRA resumed federal- and state-mandated employment engagement requirements earlier in that fiscal year.

sources.label: Human Resources Administration, Fiscal 2024 Mayor's Management Report
Human Resources Administration, Fiscal 2025 Mayor's Management Report

oneLiner: increasing since HRA resumed state-mandated employment engagement requirements
